tests.name: framework_self_guard_active
tests.details: Running init.sh from $FRAMEWORK exits 1 with 'Refusing to operate inside the Solo Orchestrator framework repo' (PR #18 / U-N+U-O stays fixed)

documentation_gaps.gap: process-checklist.sh --help omits --start-phase1 (defined at line 45) and --start-phase3/--start-phase4 are listed but --start-phase1 is not, even though the action is implemented
documentation_gaps.where: scripts/process-checklist.sh help output around the Commands section

tests.name: start_phase1_exits_zero
tests.details: --start-phase1 returns 0 and writes phase1_architecture object into process-state.json

tests.name: phase1_steps_array_present
tests.details: .phase1_architecture.steps_completed is an empty array on start

tests.name: each_phase1_step_completes
tests.details: All 5 PHASE1_STEPS (architecture_selected, threat_model_complete, data_model_defined, ui_scaffolding_done, bible_synthesized) accepted via --complete-step in order without artifact gating

tests.name: phase1_to_phase2_gate_passes
tests.details: check-gate.sh --preflight requires manifest.host field which init.sh does not write. Backfill with check-gate.sh --backfill-host requires interactive y/N confirm; piping 'yes' works but agents/CI cannot consume EOF stdin path. After backfill, preflight reports '[FAIL] Not ready: protection verification failed' but exits 0 — so the verification status is unreliable for scripted gating.

tests.name: phase_state_advances_to_2
tests.details: current_phase remained 0 after Phase 1 completion. No script auto-advances .current_phase. U-D from prior sweep is still open.

framework_bugs.summary: U-D confirmation: no script advances current_phase after gate passes
framework_bugs.reproduction: 1. init.sh --non-interactive ... 2. process-checklist.sh --start-phase1 3. complete all PHASE1_STEPS 4. check-gate.sh --preflight 5. jq '.current_phase' .claude/phase-state.json
framework_bugs.expected: current_phase becomes 1 (or 2) after Phase 1 closure / gate clearance
framework_bugs.actual: current_phase stays at 0; no public command exists to advance it. Test had to manually `jq '.current_phase=2' phase-state.json` to continue.

framework_bugs.summary: check-gate.sh --backfill-host requires interactive confirmation, no --yes flag
framework_bugs.reproduction: 1. After init.sh, run check-gate.sh --preflight — fails because manifest lacks host field. 2. Run check-gate.sh --backfill-host — prompts 'Confirm this is correct? [y/N]:' on stdin. With non-interactive stdin (e.g., agent context), the read returns empty and the script aborts with 'Aborted — no changes made.'
framework_bugs.expected: Either init.sh writes manifest.host directly, OR check-gate.sh --backfill-host has --yes/--non-interactive that skips the prompt, OR the prompt defaults to Y when stdin is non-interactive and the inferred host matches origin URL
framework_bugs.actual: Script blocks scripted use; agents must `yes |` the call to make progress

framework_bugs.summary: init.sh does not populate manifest.host even when --git-host flag is provided
framework_bugs.expected: manifest.host == 'other' when --git-host is specified at init time (or when origin is configured before init runs verify-install)
framework_bugs.actual: manifest.host is absent; check-gate.sh subsequently fails with 'manifest.json missing host field'. Forces the user/agent through check-gate.sh --backfill-host as a separate step.

framework_bugs.summary: check-gate.sh --preflight prints [FAIL] but exits 0 on protection verification failure
framework_bugs.reproduction: After backfill-host, run check-gate.sh --preflight against fake remote: prints '[FAIL] Not ready: protection verification failed' but $? is 0
framework_bugs.expected: Non-zero exit when protection verification reports failure, so scripted phase-gate workflows can detect it
framework_bugs.actual: Exit 0 even on FAIL output; gate-readiness cannot be programmatically asserted

tests.name: start_feature_records_state
tests.details: --start-feature 'uat-feat-1' set .build_loop.feature accordingly

tests.name: each_step_completes_in_order
tests.details: All 5 build_loop steps (tests_written, tests_verified_failing, implemented, security_audit, documentation_updated) accepted in order with feature-specific security audit stub at docs/security-audits/uat-feat-1-security-audit.md

tests.name: pre_commit_passes_after_loop
tests.details: git commit with feat: prefix succeeds after all 5 build steps complete

tests.name: bl006_blocks_feat_without_loop
tests.details: Direct shell `git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop'` SUCCEEDED (exit 0). The PreToolUse hook is not invoked from the shell. Calling process-checklist.sh --check-commit-message directly correctly returns rc=1 and prints the BL-006 explanation. This is U-C still open (no commit-msg hook installed).

tests.name: bl006_grace_window_resets_after_record
tests.details: After --record-feature uat-feat-1 + complete-step build_loop:feature_recorded, a NEW --start-feature uat-feat-2 + full Build Loop allowed git commit -m 'feat(uat-2): grace window test' to succeed. PR #17 grace-window reset works.

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_blocks_commit
tests.details: With a properly-formed .claude/pending-approval.json (via pending-approval.sh --offer ... --options ... --recommendation ...), pre-commit-gate.sh receiving '{"tool_input":{"command":"git commit -m test"}}' on stdin emits hookSpecificOutput with permissionDecision=deny and the pending question text

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_resolves
tests.details: pending-approval.sh --resolve removed the file; subsequent pre-commit-gate.sh emit a different deny reason (Phase 2 init not verified) — i.e., sentinel deny path is gone

tests.name: recorded_feature_appears_in_progress
tests.details: .claude/build-progress.json .features_completed contains 'uat-feat-1' (and 'uat-feat-2' from the grace-window test)

framework_bugs.summary: U-C confirmation: BL-006 not enforced for direct shell git commits
framework_bugs.reproduction: 1. git remote add origin https://example.com/fake.git 2. With no --start-feature called, run: git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(no-loop): bypass'
framework_bugs.expected: Commit blocked at the git layer (commit-msg hook) when feat: prefix used without an active Build Loop
framework_bugs.actual: Commit succeeds; only the PreToolUse hook (which Claude Code uses) and process-checklist.sh --check-commit-message catch it. Shell-direct commits bypass entirely. This was U-C from the 2026-04-25 sweep and remains unfixed.

framework_bugs.summary: pending-approval.sh --validate prints [FAIL] but exits 0 on schema violations
framework_bugs.reproduction: 1. Write a malformed .claude/pending-approval.json (e.g., missing 'question' field). 2. bash scripts/pending-approval.sh --validate .claude/pending-approval.json 3. echo $?
framework_bugs.expected: Non-zero exit code when validate detects a schema error (current output already says '[FAIL] Schema error: question missing or empty')
framework_bugs.actual: Exit code is 0 despite the [FAIL] message; this prevents scripted use of --validate as a precondition check. (The pre-commit-gate.sh path treats malformed sentinels as 'in-flight' and denies anyway, but --validate's own contract is broken.)

tests.name: start_phase3_exits_zero
tests.details: --start-phase3 returns 0; phase3_validation initialized in process-state.json

tests.name: start_uat_creates_session
tests.details: .uat_session.started_at populated, session_id=1

tests.name: uat_template_lints_clean
tests.details: Copied templates/uat/test-session-template.html, replaced placeholders (steps as a STRING with \n separators per linter contract; expected >=60 chars; first step starts with 'You are'). lint-uat-scenarios.sh exits 0 with 'All 1 scenarios clean.'

tests.name: each_uat_step_completes
tests.details: All 9 UAT_STEPS (agents_dispatched..gate_passed) accepted via --complete-step in order

tests.name: phase3_to_phase4_gate
tests.details: All 9 PHASE3_STEPS accepted with stub artifacts in docs/test-results/. legal_review passed because no PRIVACY_POLICY.md / TERMS_OF_SERVICE.md exist (personal scenario).

documentation_gaps.gap: lint-uat-scenarios.sh has no --help flag; passing --help is treated as a filename and produces 'lint-uat-scenarios.sh: --help: No such file or directory'

test-session-template.html contains a literal '__PLACEHOLDER__' token in a comment (line 142) that the linter's file-level Check 1 treats as an unreplaced placeholder. Agents stubbing the template must delete that line, which is not documented anywhere

Linter expects scenario .steps to be a STRING with \n separators, not a JSON array. The template's AGENT instruction at line 148 documents 'feature: number ... id: string' but does not state that steps is a string. Submitting a steps: ["a","b"] array makes the linter's HEAD -1 collapse to '[' and produce a confusing 'state-restatement' error.

tests.name: start_phase4_exits_zero
tests.details: --start-phase4 returns 0

tests.name: each_phase4_step_completes
tests.details: All 6 PHASE4_STEPS (production_build, rollback_tested, go_live_verified, monitoring_configured, handoff_written, handoff_tested) accepted with appropriate stub artifacts

tests.name: handoff_md_required
tests.details: Without HANDOFF.md, monitoring_configured rc=1 with [FAIL] Artifact check failed; with HANDOFF.md containing 'sentry crashlytics', step accepted

tests.name: release_notes_required
tests.details: go_live_verified gate accepted RELEASE_NOTES.md stub

tests.name: phase4_completion_state
tests.details: After all 6 phase4_release steps complete, .claude/phase-state.json .current_phase remains 2 (no advance to 4 or 'released'). This is the same U-D no-auto-advance problem that affected Phase 1 closure.

framework_bugs.summary: U-D confirmation: current_phase never advances past 2 even after Phase 4 release closure
framework_bugs.reproduction: Complete all build_loop, phase3_validation, and phase4_release steps. Then jq '.current_phase' .claude/phase-state.json
framework_bugs.expected: current_phase advances to 3 after Phase 3, then 4 (or 'released') after phase4_release:handoff_tested closes
framework_bugs.actual: current_phase stays at whatever value the user last manually set (2 in this run). Confirms U-D is open and surfaces in every phase transition, not just 1->2.

documentation_gaps.gap: .claude/phase-state.json .gates only tracks phase_0_to_1, phase_1_to_2, phase_3_to_4 — missing phase_2_to_3 and phase_4_to_released, which is inconsistent with the 5-phase methodology and prevents downstream tooling from knowing release closure happened

tests.name: no_uncommitted_secrets
tests.details: 30 files mention 'password|api_key|secret|token' but all are documentation/code text; no real secret patterns (sk_/pk_/ghp_/AIza/etc.) and no assignment patterns with high-entropy values

tests.name: log_files_consistent
tests.details: .claude/process-audit.log does not exist; no FORCE/reset events occurred. Marked N/A per runbook.

tests.name: no_orphaned_tempfiles
tests.details: find .claude -name '*.tmp' returned no results

tests.name: no_framework_contamination
tests.details: git -C $FRAMEWORK rev-parse HEAD == d66e8f276079aa352ba90ac54386e1b1896d7494 (matches start-of-sweep SHA); git -C $FRAMEWORK status --short shows only the pre-existing untracked '.claude/' and 'Reports/uat-2026-04-26/' that were present before this run. PR #18 framework-self guard held.

summary: Base/personal/mobile/standard sweep: PR #19 --non-interactive init works end-to-end; PR #17 grace-window reset, PR #17/U-H helper-copy, PR #18 framework-self guard, and BL-015 sentinel all hold. Confirmed open prior-sweep U-C (BL-006 commit-msg hook missing) and U-D (no auto-advance of current_phase) plus three new Medium bugs around manifest.host workflow (init.sh doesn't populate, --backfill-host needs --yes, --preflight returns 0 on FAIL) and pending-approval.sh --validate exit-code mismatch.
